ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Human characters gain a +2 racial bonus to one ability score of their choice at creation to represent their varied nature.

feat.name: Bonus Feat
feat.description: Humans select one extra feat at 1st level.

feat.name: Skilled
feat.description: Humans gain an additional skill rank at first level and one additional rank whenever they gain a level.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Dwarves are both tough and wise, but also a bit gruff. They gain +2 Constitution, +2 Wisdom, and –2 Charisma.

movement.name: Slow and Steady
movement.description: Dwarves have a base speed of 20 feet, but their speed is never modified by armor or encumbrance.

senses.name: Darkvision
senses.description: Dwarves can see perfectly in the dark up to 60 feet.

defense.name: Defensive Training
defense.description: Dwarves gain a +4 dodge bonus to AC against monsters of the giant subtype.

defense.name: Hardy
defense.description: Dwarves gain a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against poison, spells, and spell-like abilities.

mechanics.condition: vs poisons, spells, and spell-like abilities

defense.name: Stability
defense.description: Dwarves gain a +4 racial bonus to their Combat Maneuver Defense when resisting a bull rush or trip attempt while standing on the ground.

mechanics.condition: vs bull rush and trip while on ground

skill.name: Greed
skill.description: Dwarves gain a +2 racial bonus on Appraise checks made to determine the price of non-magical goods that contain precious metals or gemstones.

skill.name: Stonecunning
skill.description: Dwarves gain a +2 bonus on Perception checks to notice unusual stonework, such as traps and hidden doors located in stone walls or floors. They receive a check to notice such features whenever they pass within 10 feet of them, whether or not they are actively looking.

offense.name: Hatred
offense.description: Dwarves gain a +1 racial bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the orc and goblinoid subtypes because of their special training against these hated foes.

offense.name: Weapon Familiarity
offense.description: Dwarves are proficient with battleaxes, heavy picks, and warhammers, and treat any weapon with the word \"dwarven\" in its name as a martial weapon.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Elves are nimble, both in body and mind, but their form is frail. They gain +2 Dexterity, +2 Intelligence, and –2 Constitution.

senses.name: Low-Light Vision
senses.description: Elves can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

defense.name: Elven Immunities
defense.description: Elves are immune to magic sleep effects and gain a +2 racial saving throw bonus against enchantment spells and effects.

skill.name: Keen Senses
skill.description: Elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception skill checks.

offense.name: Weapon Familiarity
offense.description: Elves are proficient with longbows (including composite longbows), longswords, rapiers, and shortbows (including composite shortbows), and treat any weapon with the word "elven" in its name as a martial weapon.

magical.name: Elven Magic
magical.description: Elves receive a +2 racial bonus on caster level checks made to overcome spell resistance. In addition, elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Spellcraft skill checks made to identify the properties of magic items.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Gnomes are physically weak but surprisingly hardy, and their attitude makes them naturally agreeable. They gain +2 Constitution, +2 Charisma, and –2 Strength.

senses.name: Low-Light Vision
senses.description: Gnomes can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

defense.name: Defensive Training
defense.description: Gnomes gain a +4 dodge bonus to AC against monsters of the giant subtype.

defense.name: Illusion Resistance
defense.description: Gnomes gain a +2 racial saving throw bonus against illusion spells and effects.

skill.name: Keen Senses
skill.description: Gnomes receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception skill checks.

skill.name: Obsessive
skill.description: Gnomes receive a +2 racial bonus on a Craft or Profession skill of their choice.

offense.name: Hatred
offense.description: Gnomes receive a +1 bonus on attack rolls against humanoid creatures of the reptilian and goblinoid subtypes because of their special training against these hated foes.

offense.name: Weapon Familiarity
offense.description: Gnomes treat any weapon with the word "gnome" in its name as a martial weapon.

magical.name: Gnome Magic
magical.description: Gnomes add +1 to the DC of any saving throws against illusion spells that they cast. Gnomes with Charisma scores of 11 or higher also gain the following spell-like abilities: 1/day—dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation, and speak with animals. The caster level for these effects is equal to the gnome's level. The DC for these spells is equal to 10 + the spell's level + the gnome's Charisma modifier.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Half-elf characters gain a +2 bonus to one ability score of their choice at creation to represent their varied nature.

senses.name: Low-Light Vision
senses.description: Half-elves can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.

defense.name: Elven Immunities
defense.description: Half-elves are immune to magic sleep effects and gain a +2 racial saving throw bonus against enchantment spells and effects.

skill.name: Keen Senses
skill.description: Half-elves receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception skill checks.

feat.name: Adaptability
feat.description: Half-elves receive Skill Focus as a bonus feat at 1st level.

feat.name: Multitalented
feat.description: Half-elves choose two favored classes at first level and gain +1 hit point or +1 skill point whenever they take a level in either one of those classes.

mechanics.bonus: +1 hp or +1 skill point per level

other.name: Elf Blood
other.description: Half-elves count as both elves and humans for any effect related to race.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Half-orc characters gain a +2 bonus to one ability score of their choice at creation to represent their varied nature.

senses.name: Darkvision
senses.description: Half-orcs can see in the dark up to 60 feet.

skill.name: Intimidating
skill.description: Half-orcs receive a +2 racial bonus on Intimidate skill checks due to their fearsome nature.

offense.name: Orc Ferocity
offense.description: Once per day, when a half-orc is brought below 0 hit points but not killed, he can fight on for one more round as if disabled. At the end of his next turn, unless brought to above 0 hit points, he immediately falls unconscious and begins dying.

mechanics.trigger: brought below 0 hp but not killed
mechanics.effect: fight on for 1 round as if disabled

offense.name: Weapon Familiarity
offense.description: Half-orcs are proficient with greataxes and falchions and treat any weapon with the word "orc" in its name as a martial weapon.

other.name: Orc Blood
other.description: Half-orcs count as both humans and orcs for any effect related to race.

ability.name: Ability Score Racial Traits
ability.description: Halflings are nimble and strong-willed, but their small stature makes them weaker than other races. They gain +2 Dexterity, +2 Charisma, and –2 Strength.

defense.name: Fearless
defense.description: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against fear. This bonus stacks with the bonus granted by halfling luck.

defense.name: Halfling Luck
defense.description: Halflings receive a +1 racial bonus on all saving throws.

skill.name: Keen Senses
skill.description: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on Perception skill checks.

skill.name: Sure-Footed
skill.description: Halflings receive a +2 racial bonus on Acrobatics and Climb skill checks.

offense.name: Weapon Familiarity
offense.description: Halflings are proficient with slings and treat any weapon with the word "halfling" in its name as a martial weapon.
